channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Government urged to improve access to finance for small businesses to tackle unemployment
item.description: Dar es Salaam – Researchers and experts in Tanzania are calling on the government to establish dedicated financial support mechanisms for micro, small, and medium enterprises (MSMEs) under the Ministr...

item.title: Voters Criticize Trump After Comments on Economic Impact of Iran War
item.description: President Donald Trump faced significant criticism after telling reporters that he does not consider Americans' financial struggles when making decisions about the Iran war. The remarks, made outside ...

item.title: Nicobarese Tribal Council raises concerns over wildlife sanctuaries on Little Nicobar, Meroe, and Menchal islands
item.description: The Tribal Council of Little and Great Nicobar has expressed strong opposition to the Union government's notification of three wildlife sanctuaries on Little Nicobar, Meroe, and Menchal islands. These...

item.title: Significant Steps Taken to Address Union Challenges
item.description: The Tanzanian government and relevant stakeholders have reported notable progress in addressing long-standing Union challenges affecting the country. Efforts have focused on improving governance, lega...

item.title: Adebayo Alleges Tinubu Wants Control Over Multiple Parties Ahead Of 2027 Election
item.description: Prince Adewole Adebayo, SDP presidential candidate for the 2027 elections, don talk say opposition parties gats stand gidigba against corruption, insecurity, and injustice. E accuse President Bola Tin...

item.title: Nigeria-South Africa Chamber calls for peace amid South Africa unrest
item.description: The Nigeria-South Africa Chamber of Commerce don call for calm and proper dialogue after new wahala burst for some parts of South Africa. The unrest dey disturb communities, affect businesses, and dey...

item.title: First Lady Melania Trump Does Not Attend Beijing Summit Amid Reports of Tensions
item.description: First Lady Melania Trump did not join President Donald Trump for his three-day summit in Beijing with Chinese President Xi Jinping. Instead, the President was accompanied by members of his cabinet, hi...

item.title: Zanzibar conducts major human rights review in preparation for UN assessment

item.title: Federal Judge Orders Return of Woman Wrongly Deported to Africa by U.S. Government
item.description: A federal judge has ruled that the Trump administration must bring back Adriana Maria Quiroz Zapata, a 55-year-old woman who was mistakenly deported from the United States to the Democratic Republic o...

item.title: CBS Evening News interrupted during Taiwan broadcast due to medical incident
item.description: During CBS Evening News coverage of President Trump's visit to China, a live broadcast from Taipei was abruptly cut short when a camera operator suffered a medical emergency. Anchor Tony Dokoupil info...

item.title: Actor Rakesh Bedi humorously responds after traffic police recognize him
item.description: Rakesh Bedi, a veteran actor known for his work in the film 'Dhurandhar,' recently became the subject of online attention after an amusing encounter with traffic police. During a routine traffic check...

item.title: Tanzania Strengthens ATIDI Partnership to Boost Private Sector Role in Vision 2050

item.title: The Strategic Significance of the Caspian Sea in Eurasian Conflicts and Trade
item.description: The Caspian Sea, often overlooked despite its size, has become increasingly central to geopolitical and economic dynamics involving Ukraine, Iran, and Russia. Ukraine’s recent strike on a Russian miss...

item.title: Tanzania Economic Overview March 2026: Growth in Exports, Gold, Manufacturing, Tourism and Stable Credit Rating
item.description: During March 2026, Tanzania's economy showed strong performance in several sectors. Exports increased by 12.8%, with gold exports jumping 38.5% to USD 4.7 billion, making it the largest export contrib...

item.title: A Detailed Look at a 1967 Suburban Kitchen
item.description: This article provides an in-depth look at suburban kitchens in the 1960s, highlighting the design trends and technological innovations of the era. In 1967, the modern kitchen became a vibrant and func...

item.title: Tanzania Plans National Events for World Environment Day 2026
item.description: Dar es Salaam — Tanzania, through the Ministry of State in the Vice President's Office responsible for Union and Environment, has lined up a series of activities to celebrate World Environment Day 202...

item.title: Interior Designer Urges King Charles to Reside at Buckingham Palace Following £369 Million Renovation
item.description: The refurbishment of Buckingham Palace, an ambitious £369 million project involving 775 rooms, remains on track, with floorboards replaced, the Grand Staircase under scaffolding, and cornicing cracks ...
